visuals.title: WordNet Semantic Relations
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350" viewBox="0 0 420 350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">WordNet and Lexical Databases</text>
  
  <!-- Central WordNet Node -->
  <circle cx="210" cy="120" r="40" fill="#2196F3" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="210" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="white" opacity="0">
    WordNet
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Lexical Database Nodes -->
  <rect x="50" y="180" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="100" y="202" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Synsets
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="150" y="230" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="200" y="252" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Relations
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="270" y="180" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="320" y="202" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Semantics
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Connections -->
  <line x1="210" y1="80" x2="100" y2="180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <line x1="210" y1="160" x2="200" y2="230" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <line x1="210" y1="80" x2="320" y2="180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Applications -->
  <rect x="160" y="280" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="302" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    NLP Applications
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <line x1="200" y1="270" x2="210" y2="280" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
</svg>
